check.command: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno doc --lint source/runtime/mod.ts

build.command: npm ci --omit=dev --quiet && deno bundle --quiet $(deno task _externals) source/runtime/mod.ts --output dist/mod.mjs && deno bundle --quiet $(deno task _externals) source/runtime/deno.ts --output dist/deno.mjs && deno bundle --quiet $(deno task _externals) source/runtime/deno_worker.ts --output dist/deno_worker.mjs && deno bundle --quiet $(deno task _externals) source/runtime/deno_dev.ts --output dist/deno_dev.mjs && deno task --quiet _html
